ai_summary: The Great Eastern Shipping Company Limited (GE Shipping) has taken delivery of a 2015-built Long Range 2 Tanker, 'Jag Laxman', fully financed through internal accruals, underscoring strong financial health and contributing to their current fleet's near 100% capacity utilization. This acquisition is part of a broader fleet optimization strategy, as the company also plans to sell a secondhand Long Range 2 Product Tanker in Q2 FY27, maintaining a dynamic fleet of 41 vessels without any apparent red flags.
